japan.title: Ultimate Japan Student Visa & Scholarship Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Students
japan.description: A complete roadmap for Bangladeshi students seeking higher education in Japan. Covering the COE process, MEXT and JASSO scholarship details, comprehensive English proficiency requirements (IELTS, PTE, Duolingo), financial solvency, and 2026 approval trends.

visa_category_details.entry_type: Single Entry (Converted to Residence Card upon arrival)
visa_category_details.eligibility: Applicants with a valid Admission Offer and an issued Certificate of Eligibility (COE) from the Ministry of Justice, Japan.

government_funded.name: MEXT (Monbukagakusho) Scholarship
government_funded.benefits: Full tuition waiver, monthly stipend (¥117,000 - ¥145,000), and round-trip airfare.
government_funded.application_window: April–May (Embassy Recommendation) or via University Recommendation.
government_funded.selection_criteria: High academic GPA, research proposal (for postgrads), and written exams.

private_and_partial.name: JASSO Reservation Program
private_and_partial.benefits: Monthly stipend of ¥48,000 for EJU high-scorers.
private_and_partial.target: Self-funded students with excellent entrance results.

private_and_partial.name: Honjo International Scholarship Foundation
private_and_partial.benefits: Monthly stipend up to ¥210,000 for graduate students.
private_and_partial.special_note: Requires proficiency in Japanese or high-level English research.

private_and_partial.name: Maki Scholarship Foundation
private_and_partial.benefits: Covers tuition and living costs for specific partner universities in Japan.

english_language_test_requirements_2026.overview: For English-Medium Programs (G30/Global Programs), standardized test scores are mandatory. Requirements vary by university rank.

duolingo_det.acceptance_note: Widely accepted by private universities and some public research institutions post-2024.

toefl_ibt.note: Preferred by top-tier National Universities (UTokyo, Kyoto, Osaka).

financial_solvency_thresholds.self_funded_min_balance: BDT 2,500,000 - 3,500,000 (Equivalent to 1st year tuition + ¥2,000,000 living costs)
financial_solvency_thresholds.sponsor_profile: First-degree relative (Father/Mother) preferred. Sponsors must show stable monthly income and professional status.
financial_solvency_thresholds.bank_history_requirement: 6 to 12 months of consistent transaction history. Sudden 'lump-sum' deposits without source-of-fund proof lead to rejection.
financial_solvency_thresholds.logic: The Japanese Immigration Bureau requires proof that the student can survive without illegal work and cover all educational expenses.

embassy_submission_docs: Original Passport (Valid for duration of stay)
Original COE (Certificate of Eligibility) + 1 Photocopy
Visa Application Form (Typed with QR Code)
One Photo (45mm x 45mm, White background, Matte finish)
Acceptance Letter from the Japanese Institution
Educational Certificates & Transcripts (Attested by Ministry of Education & MOFA Bangladesh)
coe_phase_documents: Financial Support Declaration Form (Signed by Sponsor)
Sponsor's Income Tax Return (ITDR) for last 3 years
Trade License or Job Certificate (NOC) of the Sponsor
Relationship Proof (Birth Certificate or Family Tree from Ward Counselor/Union Parishad)
Language Proficiency Proof (JLPT N5+ / NAT-Test Q5 for language students; IELTS/PTE/Duolingo for English programs)

processing_and_approval_metrics.coe_processing_time: 2 - 3 months (Issued by regional Immigration Bureaus like Tokyo, Osaka, Nagoya)
processing_and_approval_metrics.visa_processing_time: 5 - 10 working days after COE submission at JVAC (Japan Visa Application Centre)
processing_and_approval_metrics.approval_chances: High (95%+) once a COE is issued, provided data matches perfectly with original submission.
processing_and_approval_metrics.interview_probability: Medium. Specifically for language school students to verify basic Hiragana/Katakana and 'Study Motivation'.

high_risk_reasons: Inconsistency between documents submitted to School vs documents submitted to Embassy.
Inability to explain the 'Study Gap' logically.
Inadequate Japanese language ability for language school tracks.
Suspicious financial documents (Fake bank statements or unverifiable income sources).
Previous visa rejection from any country (must be disclosed).
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation_strategy: Ensure all translations (Bengali to English/Japanese) are notarized by authorized translators and information remains 100% consistent across all phases.

work_rights_and_stay.part_time_permission: Up to 28 hours per week (Requires 'Shikakugai Katsu' sticker at airport immigration).
work_rights_and_stay.vacation_hours: Up to 40 hours per week during official semester breaks (Spring/Summer/Winter).
work_rights_and_stay.visa_extension: Renewable based on attendance (must stay above 80-90%) and academic performance.
work_rights_and_stay.post_study_work: Eligible to switch to a 'Humanities/Engineer' work visa upon securing a job offer (minimum salary approx. ¥200,000/month).

step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_1: Research Universities/Language Schools and check English (IELTS/PTE) or Japanese (JLPT) requirements.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_2: Submit application to the institution and pass the interview.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_3: Pay the screening fee and submit financial documents for the COE application.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_4: Wait for COE (Issued by Japanese Immigration).
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_5: Pay 1st-semester tuition fees to the institution and receive original COE.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_6: Submit Visa application at JVAC Bangladesh with the original COE.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_7: Fly to Japan and receive the Residence Card (Zairyu Card) at the airport.

faq_student_edition.question: Can I apply with Duolingo for 2026 intake?
faq_student_edition.answer: Yes, many private universities and language institutes in Japan now accept Duolingo (DET) as a cost-effective alternative to IELTS, typically requiring a score of 105+.

faq_student_edition.question: Is a study gap acceptable for Japan?
faq_student_edition.answer: Gaps of 2-5 years are generally accepted with a valid explanation (work experience or skill development). Gaps over 5 years require much stronger documentation of motivation.

faq_student_edition.question: What is the 'Permission to Engage in Activity other than that Permitted'?
faq_student_edition.answer: It is the legal authorization for students to work part-time. You should apply for this immediately upon landing at the Japanese airport to avoid delays.

youtube_video_options.video_title: Japan Student Visa Visa 2026: Avoiding Common Rejections
Step-by-Step Japan Student Visa Application from Bangladesh
How to Write a Perfect Cover Letter for Japan Student Visa

canada.title: Ultimate Canada Student Visa & Scholarship Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Students
canada.description: A complete roadmap for Bangladeshi students seeking higher education in Canada. Covering the PAL and Study Permit process, Entrance and Government scholarship details, comprehensive English proficiency requirements (IELTS, PTE, Duolingo), financial solvency (GIC), and 2026 approval trends.

visa_category_details.entry_type: TRV or eTA (Issued alongside Study Permit approval)
visa_category_details.eligibility: Applicants with a valid Letter of Acceptance (LOA) and a Provincial Attestation Letter (PAL) from a Designated Learning Institution (DLI).

government_funded.name: Vanier Canada Graduate Scholarships
government_funded.benefits: $50,000 per year for three years for high-quality doctoral students.
government_funded.selection_criteria: Academic excellence, research potential, and leadership skills.

private_and_partial.name: Lester B. Pearson International Scholarships
private_and_partial.benefits: Covers tuition, books, incidental fees, and full residence support for 4 years.
private_and_partial.target: Exceptional undergraduate students at the University of Toronto.

private_and_partial.name: Karen McKellin International Leader of Tomorrow Award
private_and_partial.benefits: Need-based funding covering tuition and living costs.
private_and_partial.special_note: Awarded by UBC to international undergraduates with superior academic records.

private_and_partial.name: Pierre Elliott Trudeau Foundation Scholarships
private_and_partial.benefits: Up to $60,000 per year for three years for doctoral candidates in humanities/social sciences.
private_and_partial.target: Social science PhD students with a focus on public issues.

english_language_test_requirements_2026.overview: For English-Medium programs, standardized test scores are mandatory. SDS (Student Direct Stream) equivalents often require higher sub-scores.

duolingo_det.acceptance_note: Widely accepted by Colleges and many Universities for non-SDS applications.

toefl_ibt.note: Preferred by top-tier research universities (UofT, McGill, UBC).

financial_solvency_thresholds.self_funded_min_balance: BDT 3,000,000 - 4,500,000 (Equivalent to 1st year tuition + GIC of $20,635 CAD)
financial_solvency_thresholds.sponsor_profile: First-degree relative (Father/Mother). Sponsors must show significant liquid assets and stable business/employment ties.
financial_solvency_thresholds.bank_history_requirement: 4 to 6 months of consistent transaction history. Proof of GIC (Guaranteed Investment Certificate) is now the primary financial benchmark.
financial_solvency_thresholds.logic: IRCC requires proof that the student has sufficient funds to cover tuition and the updated cost-of-living requirement without working.

embassy_submission_docs: Original Passport (Valid for the duration of intended stay)
Study Permit Approval Letter (Correspondence Letter)
Visa Application Forms (IMM 1294, 5645, 5257)
Two Photos (35mm x 45mm, White background, Matte finish)
Letter of Acceptance (LOA) and Provincial Attestation Letter (PAL)
Educational Certificates & Transcripts (Notarized and attested)

processing_and_approval_metrics.coe_processing_time: 1 - 2 months (Time to secure LOA and Provincial Attestation Letter)
processing_and_approval_metrics.visa_processing_time: 8 - 12 weeks for Bangladesh (Standard processing through VFS Global)
processing_and_approval_metrics.approval_chances: Moderate to High (Depends heavily on SOP, PAL availability, and financial clarity).
processing_and_approval_metrics.interview_probability: Low. IRCC usually decides based on the paper/online application but may call for an interview in rare cases.

high_risk_reasons: Weak Statement of Purpose (SOP) failing to prove 'Dual Intent'.
Inadequate financial proof or lack of GIC for non-SDS streams.
Program 'Mismatch' relative to previous academic or work history.
Undisclosed previous visa rejections (Misrepresentation).
Insufficient 'Home Ties' indicating the student will not leave Canada after study.
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation_strategy: Draft a highly specific SOP that links the Canadian degree to a concrete career path in Bangladesh and ensure all financial documents are verifiable.

work_rights_and_stay.part_time_permission: Up to 24 hours per week (Updated from 20 hours in 2024/25).
work_rights_and_stay.vacation_hours: Full-time work allowed during scheduled academic breaks (Summer/Winter).
work_rights_and_stay.visa_extension: Study Permit extension must be applied for 30 days before the current permit expires.
work_rights_and_stay.post_study_work: Eligible for PGWP (Post-Graduation Work Permit) for up to 3 years depending on the program length.

step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_1: Research DLIs and ensure the program is eligible for PGWP and receive an LOA.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_2: Apply for and receive the Provincial Attestation Letter (PAL) from the university/province.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_3: Purchase a GIC ($20,635+ CAD) from a participating Canadian bank (Scotiabank, CIBC, etc.).
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_4: Upfront Medical Exam at an IRCC-approved panel physician.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_5: Submit the Study Permit application online via the IRCC portal.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_6: Give Biometrics at VFS Global Dhaka/Chittagong and wait for eligibility review.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_7: Receive Passport Request (PPR), get visa stamped, and receive Study Permit at the Port of Entry.

faq_student_edition.question: Can I apply with Duolingo for 2026 intake?
faq_student_edition.answer: Yes, many Canadian colleges and several universities accept Duolingo for admission. However, for visa purposes, ensure your overall profile remains strong as it is a non-SDS application.

faq_student_edition.question: Is a study gap acceptable for Canada?
faq_student_edition.answer: Gaps of 2-8 years are common for Master’s applicants if backed by work experience. Undergraduate gaps over 2 years require a strong explanation in the SOP.

faq_student_edition.question: What is the 'Provincial Attestation Letter' (PAL)?
faq_student_edition.answer: It is a mandatory document introduced in 2024 that verifies the student is within the provincial cap for international study permits. You cannot apply for a visa without it.

youtube_video_options.video_title: Canada Study Permit 2026: New Rules & PAL Explained
Step-by-Step Canada Student Visa from Bangladesh 2026
How to Open GIC and Pay Tuition Fees for Canada

australia.title: Ultimate Australia Student Visa & Scholarship Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Students
australia.description: A complete roadmap for Bangladeshi students seeking higher education in Australia. Covering the CoE and Genuine Student (GS) process, Australia Awards and Destination Australia scholarships, English requirements (IELTS, PTE), financial capacity, and 2026 approval metrics.

visa_category_details.entry_type: Multiple Entry (Valid for the duration of the course)
visa_category_details.eligibility: Applicants with a valid Confirmation of Enrolment (CoE) and who satisfy the 'Genuine Student' (GS) requirement.

government_funded.name: Australia Awards Scholarships
government_funded.benefits: Full tuition, return air travel, establishment allowance, and Contribution to Living Expenses (CLE).
government_funded.application_window: February–April annually (for the following year's intake).
government_funded.selection_criteria: Academic merit, leadership potential, and contribution to Bangladesh's development.

private_and_partial.name: Destination Australia Scholarship
private_and_partial.benefits: Up to AUD 15,000 per year for students studying in regional Australia.
private_and_partial.target: Students enrolled at regional campus locations (e.g., Adelaide, Perth, Hobart).

private_and_partial.name: Vice-Chancellor's International Scholarships
private_and_partial.benefits: Range from AUD 10,000 to 50% tuition fee reduction.
private_and_partial.special_note: Offered by universities like USyd, Monash, and Deakin for high-achieving students.

private_and_partial.name: Research Training Program (RTP)
private_and_partial.benefits: Tuition fee offset and a living stipend of approx. AUD 32,000 - 35,000 annually.
private_and_partial.target: Masters by Research or PhD candidates.

english_language_test_requirements_2026.overview: Australia strictly requires English proficiency for Subclass 500. While universities might accept others, the Department of Home Affairs has specific accepted tests.

duolingo_det.acceptance_note: Accepted by some universities for admission, but usually NOT accepted by Home Affairs for the visa unless an alternative is provided.

toefl_ibt.note: Widely accepted; scores must be from a single sitting.

financial_solvency_thresholds.self_funded_min_balance: BDT 4,500,000 - 6,000,000 (Equivalent to 1st year tuition + AUD 29,710 living costs + travel).
financial_solvency_thresholds.sponsor_profile: Parents, spouse, or close relatives. Must show an annual income of at least AUD 87,856 if no secondary applicants are included.
financial_solvency_thresholds.bank_history_requirement: 3 to 6 months of stable history or a sanctioned Education Loan from a Grade-A bank. Sudden deposits require proof of asset sale/income.
financial_solvency_thresholds.logic: The 'Genuine Access' rule ensures that the funds aren't just for show but are actually available for the student's use in Australia.

embassy_submission_docs: Valid Passport
Confirmation of Enrolment (CoE) - All codes if packaged
Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC) for the full visa duration
Digital Photo (35mm x 45mm, White background)
Genuine Student (GS) Statement (Detailed answers to specific logic questions)
Academic Documents (Transcripts/Certificates) - Scanned originals
coe_phase_documents: Proof of Relationship with Sponsor (Birth Cert / Marriage Cert)
Sponsor’s Employment/Business Proof (Trade License / Tax Returns)
Statement of Purpose (SOP) for University admission

processing_and_approval_metrics.visa_processing_time: 15 - 45 days (80% of applications are processed within this window)
processing_and_approval_metrics.approval_chances: High for Level-1 Universities; Moderate for VET/Private Colleges. Focus is on 'Genuine Student' intent.
processing_and_approval_metrics.interview_probability: Low to Medium. Conducted by the High Commission to verify the GS statement claims.

high_risk_reasons: Failure to explain why an Australian degree is better than a Bangladeshi degree (ROI).
Applying for a course lower than current qualification level (AQF downgrade).
Unexplained study gaps exceeding 1-2 years.
Inadequate funds or inability to prove the source of sponsor's wealth.
Poor performance in the GS interview if called.
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation_strategy: Provide a detailed GS response that links the specific modules of the Australian course to high-paying job opportunities in Bangladesh.

work_rights_and_stay.part_time_permission: Up to 48 hours per fortnight (24 hours per week average).
work_rights_and_stay.vacation_hours: Unlimited working hours during official university holiday periods.
work_rights_and_stay.visa_extension: Possible to renew onshore if continuing to a higher level course (e.g., Bachelor to Master).
work_rights_and_stay.post_study_work: Eligible for Subclass 485 (Temporary Graduate Visa) for 2–4 years depending on the degree and location (Regional bonus).

step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_1: Apply to a DLI (Designated Learning Institution) and clear the university's internal GS/GTE interview.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_3: Pay the 1st semester tuition fee and OSHC (Health Insurance) to receive the CoE.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_4: Generate HAP ID and complete the medical check-up at an approved clinic.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_5: Prepare the Genuine Student (GS) responses and upload all financial/academic docs to ImmiAccount.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_6: Lodge the Subclass 500 visa application and pay the visa fee (approx. AUD 1,600 - 2,000).
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_7: Provide biometrics at VFS Global and wait for the Grant Letter.

faq_student_edition.question: Can I use Duolingo for an Australia Visa in 2026?
faq_student_edition.answer: While some universities accept Duolingo for admission, the Australian Department of Home Affairs generally requires IELTS or PTE for the visa application itself.

faq_student_edition.question: What is the 'Genuine Student' (GS) requirement?
faq_student_edition.answer: Effective 2024/25, the GS replaces the old GTE. It involves answering specific questions in the application about your study intent and career value.

faq_student_edition.question: Do I need to pay the full year's tuition before applying?
faq_student_edition.answer: No, you usually only need to pay the first semester's tuition fee (as stated in your Offer Letter) to get your CoE for the visa application.

youtube_video_options.video_title: Australia Student Visa 2026: The New GS Requirement Explained
Step-by-Step Australia Visa Application for Bangladeshis
How to Pass the Australia University GS Interview

european-union.title: Ultimate Europe (Schengen) Student Visa & Scholarship Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Students
european-union.description: A complete roadmap for Bangladeshi students seeking higher education in the EU. Covering the Blocked Account (Germany) vs. Financial Guarantee (France) processes, Erasmus Mundus scholarships, English proficiency (IELTS, PTE, Duolingo), and 2026 Schengen visa protocols.

visa_category_details.entry_type: Multi-Entry (Allows travel across the Schengen Area for 90 days in 180 days)
visa_category_details.eligibility: Applicants with a valid University Admission Letter (Zulassungsbescheid/EEF) and proof of financial subsistence for the duration of study.

government_funded.name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Masters (EMJM)
government_funded.benefits: Full tuition waiver, monthly stipend of €1,400, travel costs, and comprehensive insurance.
government_funded.selection_criteria: Excellence-based; requires a top-tier Bachelor's degree and strong motivation letter.

private_and_partial.name: DAAD Scholarships (Germany)
private_and_partial.benefits: Monthly stipend (€934 - €1,200), health insurance, and travel allowance.
private_and_partial.target: Graduate students with at least two years of professional experience.

private_and_partial.name: Eiffel Excellence Scholarship (France)
private_and_partial.benefits: Monthly allowance of €1,181 - €1,800, return trip, and social security.
private_and_partial.special_note: Applications must be submitted by the French institution on behalf of the student.

private_and_partial.name: Holland Scholarship (Netherlands)
private_and_partial.benefits: One-time payment of €5,000 to €15,000 for the first year of study.
private_and_partial.target: International students from outside the EEA.

english_language_test_requirements_2026.overview: While many public universities in Europe are free, English-taught programs require high scores. Requirements are strict for Tier-1 research universities.

duolingo_det.acceptance_note: Widely accepted in Ireland, Italy, and private German universities; less common in public German TU9s.

toefl_ibt.note: Standard for programs in Scandinavia and the Netherlands.

financial_solvency_thresholds.self_funded_min_balance: BDT 1,500,000 - 2,500,000 (Varies by country; Germany requires a Blocked Account).
financial_solvency_thresholds.sponsor_profile: Immediate family or third-party sponsors with a 'Formal Obligation' (Verpflichtungserklärung).
financial_solvency_thresholds.bank_history_requirement: Germany: Blocked Account of €11,208. France: Proof of approx. €615/month. Minimum 3–6 months history required for other EU states.
financial_solvency_thresholds.logic: Schengen states must ensure you have funds to cover the 'Socio-Cultural Minimum' without relying on social benefits.

embassy_submission_docs: Valid Passport (issued within 10 years, 3+ months validity)
Schengen Visa Form (National Type D for long stay)
University Admission Letter (Original + Copies)
Blocked Account Confirmation (Germany) or Solvency Certificate
Schengen Travel Insurance (min. €30,000 coverage)
Proof of Accommodation (for first 3 months)

processing_and_approval_metrics.coe_processing_time: 1 - 3 months (Admission assessment and VFS/Embassy appointment wait times)
processing_and_approval_metrics.visa_processing_time: 15 days to 2 months (Long-stay visas require local authority approval in the host city)
processing_and_approval_metrics.approval_chances: High for public university admits; Moderate for private or language-only tracks.
processing_and_approval_metrics.interview_probability: High. Mandatory interview at the Embassy or VFS to test language and academic motivation.

high_risk_reasons: Inability to explain why a specific German/French/Italian city was chosen.
Significant study gaps without professional documentation.
Lack of progress in German/French language if applying for taught programs.
Invalid Travel Insurance that doesn't meet Schengen Article 15 standards.
Inconsistent travel history or previous Schengen rejections.
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation_strategy: Use the Europass CV format and ensure your SOP explains exactly how the European degree benefits your career back in Bangladesh.

work_rights_and_stay.part_time_permission: 140 full days or 280 half days per year (approx. 20 hours per week).
work_rights_and_stay.vacation_hours: Full-time work allowed during semester breaks (Lecture-free periods).
work_rights_and_stay.visa_extension: Renewable yearly as a 'Residence Permit' (Aufenthaltstitel) at the local Foreigners' Office (Ausländerbehörde).
work_rights_and_stay.post_study_work: Eligible for an 18-month Job Seeker Visa (Germany) or 12-month APS (France) after graduation.

step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_1: Apply to public or private universities via Uni-Assist (Germany) or Campus France.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_2: Receive Admission Letter and open a Blocked Account (e.g., via Fintiba or Expatrio).
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_3: Book a Visa Appointment via VFS Global or the National Embassy/Consulate.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_4: Attest all academic documents from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MOFA) Bangladesh.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_5: Attend the Visa Interview and submit biometric data.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_6: Receive the stamped Visa and fly to Europe.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_7: Register your address (Anmeldung) and apply for the Residence Permit within 90 days.

faq_student_edition.question: Can I apply for 2026 intake with Duolingo?
faq_student_edition.answer: Yes for Ireland and many private schools in Italy/Germany, but most German public universities still strictly require IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 90+.

faq_student_edition.question: Are tuition fees really free in Europe?
faq_student_edition.answer: In German public universities, tuition is free (only a small semester fee), while in France/Italy, fees are significantly lower than in the UK/USA for public institutions.

faq_student_edition.question: Do I need to speak the local language?
faq_student_edition.answer: For English-taught programs, you don't 'need' it for the visa, but basic knowledge (A1/A2) is highly recommended to show 'Genuine Integration' intent.

youtube_video_options.video_title: Europe Student Visa 2026: Germany Blocked Account vs France EEF
How to Apply for Erasmus Mundus 2026 (Fully Funded)
VFS Schengen Visa Interview Questions for Bangladeshi Students

united-states.title: Ultimate USA Student Visa & Scholarship Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Students
united-states.description: A complete roadmap for Bangladeshi students seeking higher education in the United States. Covering the I-20 and SEVIS process, F-1 Visa Interview strategies, comprehensive English proficiency requirements (IELTS, TOEFL, Duolingo), and 2026 financial solvency benchmarks.

visa_category_details.entry_type: Multiple Entry (Valid for the duration of the I-20 status)
purpose: English as a Second Language (ESL) Programs
visa_category_details.eligibility: Applicants must be accepted by an SEVP-certified institution and receive an 'I-20 Certificate of Eligibility'.

government_funded.name: Fulbright Foreign Student Program
government_funded.benefits: Full tuition, living stipend, airfare, and health insurance for graduate students.
government_funded.selection_criteria: Academic excellence, leadership potential, and commitment to cross-cultural exchange.

private_and_partial.name: Institutional Merit-Based Scholarships
private_and_partial.target: International applicants with high SAT/ACT or GRE/GMAT scores.

private_and_partial.name: Graduate Assistantships (TA/RA)
private_and_partial.benefits: Full tuition coverage plus a monthly stipend in exchange for teaching or research work.
private_and_partial.special_note: Primarily available for Master's and PhD candidates at research-intensive universities.

private_and_partial.name: #YouAreWelcomeHere Scholarship
private_and_partial.benefits: Renewable tuition scholarships of at least 50% for undergraduate students.
private_and_partial.target: International students dedicated to promoting intercultural learning.

english_language_test_requirements_2026.overview: For US universities, English proficiency is a standard admission requirement. While many accept Duolingo, top-tier institutions prefer TOEFL or IELTS.

duolingo_det.acceptance_note: Accepted by over 4,500 US institutions, including several Ivy League schools, as of 2026.

toefl_ibt.note: The gold standard for US universities; scores must be sent directly via ETS.

financial_solvency_thresholds.self_funded_min_balance: BDT 5,500,000 - 8,000,000 (Equivalent to 1st year tuition + living expenses as listed on the I-20).
financial_solvency_thresholds.sponsor_profile: Parents are preferred sponsors. Must show liquid funds, stable professional income, and asset ownership (Land/Property).
financial_solvency_thresholds.bank_history_requirement: 6 months of consistent bank statements. Significant 'unexplained' large deposits just before the interview are highly discouraged.
financial_solvency_thresholds.logic: Under Section 214(b), you must prove you can afford the expensive US education without resorting to unauthorized off-campus work.

embassy_submission_docs: Original Passport (Valid for at least 6 months)
Original I-20 Form (Signed by both the student and DSO)
DS-160 Confirmation Page (with barcode)
SEVIS I-901 Fee Receipt ($350 for F-1)
Visa Interview Appointment Confirmation
One Photo (51mm x 51mm, White background, taken within 6 months)
coe_phase_documents: Sponsor's Bank Solvency & Detailed 6-month Transaction History
Sponsor's Income Tax Returns (ITDR) for last 3 years

processing_and_approval_metrics.coe_processing_time: 1 - 3 weeks (Time for university to issue I-20 after admission and financial verification)
processing_and_approval_metrics.visa_processing_time: Immediate (Result usually given at the end of the 2–3 minute interview; passport returned in 3-5 days).
processing_and_approval_metrics.approval_chances: Varies. High for those with strong academics and clear home ties; strict for weak SOP/financial cases.
processing_and_approval_metrics.interview_probability: 100% (Mandatory). Face-to-face interview with a Consular Officer is the most critical part of the process.

high_risk_reasons: Failure to demonstrate 'Strong Ties' to Bangladesh (Section 214(b) - Potential Immigrant).
Robotic or memorized answers during the interview.
Inability to clearly explain why you chose that specific university or program.
Discrepancies between DS-160 data and verbal interview statements.
Inadequate funding for subsequent years of study beyond the first year.
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation_strategy: Focus on the 'Why US' and 'Why this major' answers. Be conversational and confident; show that you are a genuine student who will return home.

work_rights_and_stay.part_time_permission: Up to 20 hours per week (On-campus only during the first academic year).
work_rights_and_stay.vacation_hours: Full-time on-campus work allowed during summer and winter breaks.
work_rights_and_stay.visa_extension: Renewable based on academic progress (requires a new I-20 for program extensions).
work_rights_and_stay.post_study_work: Eligible for OPT (Optional Practical Training) for 12 months, plus a 24-month extension for STEM majors (3 years total).

step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_1: Apply to SEVP-certified US universities and secure your Letter of Admission.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_2: Submit financial documents to the university to receive your official Form I-20.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_3: Pay the SEVIS I-901 fee online and keep the payment receipt.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_4: Complete the DS-160 Online Visa Application and pay the $185 visa fee.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_5: Schedule two appointments: Biometrics at the VAC and the Visa Interview at the Embassy.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_6: Attend the interview at the US Embassy in Dhaka and receive a verbal approval/denial.
step_by_step_application_roadmap.step_7: Prepare to fly to the US no more than 30 days before the start date on your I-20.

faq_student_edition.question: Can I apply with Duolingo for 2026 intake?
faq_student_edition.answer: Yes, many reputable US universities accept Duolingo (DET) for admission. However, ensure you also prepare for the visa interview where your spoken English will be evaluated.

faq_student_edition.question: Is a study gap acceptable for the USA?
faq_student_edition.answer: Study gaps of 2-5 years are generally accepted if you have relevant work experience. You must be prepared to explain the gap clearly to the Consular Officer.

faq_student_edition.question: What is the 214(b) rejection?
faq_student_edition.answer: It is the most common rejection reason, meaning you haven't sufficiently proven that you have strong ties to your home country and intend to return after graduation.
